# 豐年祭地圖 (Harvest Festival Map)

> 全臺唯一原住民族歲時祭儀彙整地圖。Taiwan's only comprehensive indigenous ceremonial calendar and map.

This site aggregates official indigenous festival (歲時祭儀) schedules for all 16 officially recognized tribes across Taiwan, sourced from county indigenous affairs bureaus and township offices. Data is updated annually.

## Covered tribes / 涵蓋族群

Amis (阿美族/Pangcah), Bunun (布農族), Truku (太魯閣族), Atayal (泰雅族), Paiwan (排灣族), Puyuma (卑南族), Rukai (魯凱族), Tsou (鄒族), Saisiyat (賽夏族), Tao (達悟族/雅美族), Thao (邵族), Kavalan (噶瑪蘭族), Sakizaya (撒奇萊雅族), Seediq (賽德克族), Hla'alua (拉阿魯哇族), Kanakanavu (卡那卡那富族)

## Key festivals / 主要祭典

- Ilisin / Malikoda — Amis harvest festival (阿美族豐年祭), July–September
- Malahtangia / Maho — Bunun ear-shooting festival (布農族射耳祭), April–May
- Smtyus — Atayal ancestral spirits ritual (泰雅族祖靈祭)
- Pasta'ay — Saisiyat dwarf spirit festival (賽夏族矮靈祭), biennial October
- Manavey — Tao flying fish festival (達悟族飛魚祭), spring
- Masalut — Paiwan harvest festival (排灣族豐年祭), August
- Katratripulr — Puyuma monkey festival (卑南族猴祭), December
- Mangayau — Puyuma grand hunt (卑南族大獵祭), December
- Mayasvi — Tsou warrior spirit ceremony (鄒族戰祭), February and August
